A.evidence: Body prose faithful, but Figure 1 dumped as scrambled glyph tokens (C, E/CLST, TN, (SEP], '(SEP)) inserted mid-column; inline math flattened to plain text (R H, 4 H, T i).

B.evidence: Cleanest prose with no glyph corruption; proper LaTeX inline math (C \in \mathbb{R}^H, T_i, 4H) and subscripted BERT_BASE/LARGE; Figure 1 caption placed in a reasonable reading position.

C.evidence: Word-accurate but every citation is cluttered with inline anchor cruft ([\(Peters et al.,](#page-10-0)); footnotes rendered as broken HTML entities (<sup>&</sup>lt;sup>1</sup>) and angle brackets lost ('h Question, Answeri').

D.evidence: Reaches Figure 2 with correct caption placement, but content-altering errors: 'Dai and Lee' (should be Le), 'Jernite al.' (dropped et), 'I_i' for T_i, and garbled T_i in R^H subscripting.
